summary: Tested major redesign: welcome screen, Google auth, step-by-step flow, menu (99 items), admin panel. All core flows work. 17/17 backend tests pass. Full AI recommendation flow working end-to-end.

ui_bugs.component: WelcomeScreen - language toggle and card layout
ui_bugs.issue: On mobile viewport (375-390px), the welcome screen content overflows horizontally - language toggle buttons appear at x=1791/1847 (far off-screen). Root cause: `const { width, height } = Dimensions.get('window')` returns full browser window width on web, then `bg: { flex: 1, width, height }` sets fixed pixel width causing overflow. This is a web rendering issue with React Native.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'Menyu' text in the tab bar sometimes navigates back to chat (Sawbet) tab instead of menu. Likely because the chat tab landing has 'menyu' in subtitle text. Works fine when navigating via URL /(tabs)/menu.

issues: AI result text renders markdown (** bold **) as raw asterisks instead of styled bold text - no markdown renderer used

action_items: MINOR: Fix WelcomeScreen to use flex:1 instead of fixed width/height from Dimensions.get('window') for the bg style (affects mobile web rendering)
MINOR: Add markdown rendering to result card (BlurView resultCard) so ** bold ** and * italic * render properly
INFO: Menu tab navigation via text click is ambiguous - consider using tab URLs or more specific selectors
critical_code_review_comments: WelcomeScreen bg uses `width, height` from Dimensions.get('window') as fixed pixel values - on web this equals full browser window size, causing layout overflow on smaller viewports
Result screen renders raw AI markdown text without any markdown parser - asterisks show as literal characters

success_rate.frontend: 90% - all core flows work, minor mobile web rendering issue with welcome screen on small viewports

seed_data_creation: Created test user (test-user-fixed) with session token test_session_fixed_123 for auth bypass testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified: welcome screen with food bg, Google auth redirect, Byirtpa Berin landing, 6-step flow (mood/hunger/budget/group/allergies/time), AI recommendation, result screen with Jaqtı/Basqasın buttons, menu tab with 99 items in 5 categories, history tab, admin panel CRUD. Backend 100% pass. Use test_session_fixed_123 token for auth bypass. Note: On desktop viewport (1920px) everything works correctly. Mobile web has overflow due to Dimensions.get('window') returning desktop width.
rca_of_issue: WelcomeScreen mobile overflow: In welcome.tsx line 10, `const { width, height } = Dimensions.get('window')` gets actual browser window dimensions. On web, when page is rendered at 1920px browser width but Playwright sets viewport to 390px, Dimensions still returns 1920. The style `bg: { flex: 1, width, height }` creates a fixed 1920px wide element inside a 390px viewport, pushing content off screen. Fix: change bg style to `{ flex: 1 }` removing explicit width/height.
